---
title: "Pathway Coverage Investigations"
format: html
---

### Library Load & Setup

```{r}
#| label: Setup
# ---
source(here::here("EDA", "project_settings.R"))
source(here::here("EDA", "Kaitlyn_EDA", "Reusable_Scripts", "Utility_Functions.R"))

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(knitr)
  library(patchwork)
  library(mia)  # for mergeData
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
})
```

# Structural Metadata Overview

## Tables

```{r}
#| label: Metadata Overview
# ---

# Single Study, nested list (Example)
Thomas2018a_pathcov <- CRC_progression_studies[["ThomasAM_2018a"]][["pathway_coverage"]]

# All studies combined to one list
pathcov <- merge_studies(CRC_progression_studies, "pathway_coverage")

# Metadata into dataframes from nested list
Thomas2018a_pathcov_meta <- as.data.frame(colData(Thomas2018a_pathcov))
pathcov_meta <- as.data.frame(colData(pathcov))

# Overview Tables
Thomas2018a_pathcov_meta_overview <- eda_overview_table(Thomas2018a_pathcov_meta)
pathcov_meta_overview <- eda_overview_table(pathcov_meta)

Thomas2018a_pathcov_meta_overview %>%
  arrange(Percent_Missing) %>%
  mutate(Index = row_number()) %>%              
  select(Index, everything()) %>%               
  kbl(
    col.names = c("Index",
                  "Variable Name",
                  "Total Rows",
                  "Empty Rows",
                  "Percent Missing",
                  "Unique Values",
                  "Variable Type"),
    caption = "Structural Metadata Summary for ThomasAM_2018a Pathway Coverage Data",
    format = "html"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(2, bold = TRUE)

pathcov_meta_overview %>%
  arrange(Percent_Missing) %>%
  mutate(Index = row_number()) %>%              
  select(Index, everything()) %>%               
  kbl(
    col.names = c("Index",
                  "Variable Name",
                  "Total Rows",
                  "Empty Rows",
                  "Percent Missing",
                  "Unique Values",
                  "Variable Type"),
    caption = "Structural Metadata Summary for All Pathway Coverage Data",
    format = "html"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(2, bold = TRUE)
```

## Plots/Maps

```{r}
#| label: Metadata Overview - Plots/Maps
# ---

# Heatmap of Metadata Completeness
pathcov_meta_overview %>%
  arrange(desc(Percent_Missing)) %>%
  mutate(Column_Name = factor(Column_Name, levels = Column_Name)) %>%  # lock order
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = Column_Name, fill = Percent_Missing)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "steelblue",
    high = "white",
    limits = c(0, 100)
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))) +         # <-- moved here
  labs(
    title = "Structural Metadata Completeness:\nAll Studies - Pathway Coverage Data",
    subtitle = "Percent rows with missing values",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7, lineheight = 2),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5)
  )

Thomas2018a_pathcov_meta_overview %>%
  arrange(desc(Percent_Missing)) %>%
  mutate(Column_Name = factor(Column_Name, levels = Column_Name)) %>%  # lock order
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = Column_Name, fill = Percent_Missing)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "steelblue",
    high = "white",
    limits = c(0, 100)
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))) +         # <-- moved here
  labs(
    title = "Structural Metadata Completeness:\nThomasAM_2018a - Pathway Coverage Data",
    subtitle = "Percent rows with missing values",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7, lineheight = 2),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5)
  )
```
